title: moraea gigandra
intro: Moraea gigandra, also known as the "Tiger Flower" or "Gumdrop Marigold", is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which are said to include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Moraea gigandra are believed to include relief from fever, pain, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential use as an antiseptic and antiviral agent. In herbal preparations, Moraea gigandra is often used in tea infusions, tinctures, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
